comment: F1 — the performance budget. Numbers chosen to be passable today; the point is catching drift. Bytes are raw (uncompressed); KiB = 1024 bytes. Enforced by scripts/lint-size.mjs (build), qa/perf.mjs (runtime), and qa/lighthouse.mjs (lab metrics).

bundle.comment: Revised at Wave 4 (was 184320/16384): the storytelling wave added the narrative layer — takeaways, verdicts, phases, stamps — measured +7.5KB JS / +4.9KB CSS. Revised at Wave 6 (cssBytes 20480→24576): the gate sums ALL dist CSS and the citability wave added a standalone 3.4KB subpage sheet that the instrument page never loads. Revised at Wave 8 (cssBytes 24576→26624): the engagement wave's chrome — milestone toast, mini-TOC rail, county-find selects, tour/embed styles — measured ~+1.5KB. F9 (Wave 7) already recovered the JS side to below the Wave 0 baseline.

runtimeThrottled.comment: F5 — 6× CPU throttle, 375px, DPR 2 (the corridor's mobile floor). Measured 2026-06-10: playback p95 16.7ms, max 33.3ms.

lab.comment: LCP: masthead h1; F10 preloads landed (Wave 1) — measured 1.81s local / 1.83s CI; 2400 leaves CI headroom, revisit after F19 parallel boot (Wave 2). CLS: 0.003 local, 0.009 deployed, ~0.03 on CI's slow shared runner (observed CLS scales with machine slowness). 0.05 stays inside Lighthouse's 'good' (0.1) and still catches structural regressions like the unreserved map stage (0.175).
